title: Clairefontaine - Ref 223825C - Kraft Tiny Rolls Wrapping Paper (Single Roll) - 35cm Width x 5m Length, 70gsm Recycled Kraft Paper - Red Flowers Design
features: PATTERNS: A small roll Tiny rolls of kraft paper printed with Red Flowers. Opt for an elegant and romantic design, in order to perfect your most beautiful presents.
SMALL WIDTH: Small width roll: 5mx35cm – Weight: 70g. Allows less waste and efficient storage. No more long cutting sessions. A length of 5m to wrap even more gifts. Small width but great length!

SUPERIOR QUALITY: Clairefontaine paper is of high quality. It is solid when packed and resistant when handled. The Tiny Rolls range in Kraft is a guarantee of quality thanks to its resistant paper and its unique format.
ALL OCCASIONS: A gift wrap suitable for all your birthday parties, wedding parties, or even for Mother's/Father's Day or Valentine's Day. Experience the pleasure of giving with our packaging rolls.
MADE IN FRANCE: Clairefontaine paper is made in France in our factory located in the Auvergne Rhône Alpes region.
100% RECYCLE: Kraft Tiny rolls are made from recycled and recyclable paper. Clairefontaine Rhodia cares about the environment and innovates every day to reduce its ecological impact.

CLAIREFONTAINE Rhodia is the gift wrapping specialist: our quality products meet your needs and requirements! Our wide range of gift packaging will allow you to enhance your most beautiful gifts throughout the year.
description: From the manufacturer Wrapping Paper & Gift Wrap from Clairefontaine Whether in kraft, sequined, metallic, colored or not, the basic papers can be combined with many DIY techniques and enable to create beautiful unique and original wrappings. Kraft Range - Resistant and natural, it's definetly the most trendy material! Modern designs printed on 70gsm raw Kraft will bring creativity and uniqueness to your packings. Excellia Range - Excellia collections are printed on 80gsm coated paper of highest quality. In rolls of 2, 5 or 10m, they are the favorite collections of those who appreciate beautiful gift wrapping. Resistant, light and opaque, the paper of Excellia range allows you to wrap small and big gifts without tearing Premium Range - We propose Premium range for high class, luxurious and delicate gifts. Created on 80g coated paper laminated to a polypropylene film, they offer unequaled brilliance and resistance.
